name: Lemony Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate the chicken in 1 cup of lemon juice in the refrigerator for about 12 hours, turning several times.
2. Remove from the fridge about 30 minutes before preparing.
3. Coat the chicken in a mixture of flour, salt, pepper, and thyme.
4. In a large skillet, heat the corn oil and butter over medium heat until hot, but not smoking.
5. Saute the chicken for 5-10 minutes per side, until golden brown.
6. Place the chicken in a low-sided baking dish.
7. Heat the oven to 350 degrees.
8. Mix the chicken stock with 2 tablespoons of lemon juice and pour around the chicken in the dish.
9. Sprinkle the chicken with lemon zest and thyme.
10. Bake for 35-40 minutes. Refrigerate until cold.
